name: Caleb Mills Stewart
photoAlt: Caleb Mills Stewart, director — Get Booked Studio
bio: Caleb Mills Stewart is a filmmaker and founder of Get Booked Studio. His work focuses on the overlooked intersections of personal history and American life — stories where the specific becomes the universal, and where what gets left out of the official record turns out to be the whole point.
